title: Jesus Christ Holy Lord Totem
description:
This Texture Pack makes it so that the Default Totem of Undying turns into a Catholic Cross that when used plays a segment of the Holy Rosary.

Leave your review here:
https://forms.gle/6JpTPzy3fxSs1Gc29
body:
This Resource Pack changes the Default Totem of undying for a Bronze Catholic Cross depicting Jesus Christ, It comes with a custom sound effect to soothe your mind when the Totem is Used.

Leave a Review:[https://forms.gle/KgJ2xoqiRDZjy6pk8](https://forms.gle/KgJ2xoqiRDZjy6pk8)
